title: Anthropic Just Replaced Claude Code With New Claude Tag
summary: Anthropic launched Claude Tag, a team-focused version of Claude Code that integrates natively with Slack, connects to company tools, and replaces the previous Claude Slack chatbot. The tool is in research preview with plans for wider rollout.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's launch of Claude Tag, a team-focused version of Claude Code that integrates natively with Slack and connects to company tools, replacing the earlier Claude Slack chatbot. It matters because it shifts Claude Code toward collaborative team workflows inside existing communication channels rather than individual use. The key takeaways: Claude Tag is in research preview with plans for wider rollout, and it folds company tool connections and Slack integration into a single offering.
